Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the neural network list
Correction: The system shall display the list of neural networks in a drop-down menu with each entry showing the network name and version.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology
Correction: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX format only.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support importing input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with a scrollable list if multiple results are present.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a structured JSON file.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for error and warning messages
Correction: The system shall display error and warning messages in a red-colored text box within the user interface.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for argument validity
Correction: The system shall check arguments for validity based on predefined criteria such as file format, file size, and compatibility with selected hardware.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the run-time log file
Correction: The system shall save the run-time log file in a plain text format with a timestamp for each event.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum height and width of 224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the compatibility criteria for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall ensure that imported neural network topologies are compatible with the selected hardware based on predefined compatibility criteria.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall save inference results and diagnostic data in a structured JSON file.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify the expected behavior for invalid user actions
Correction: The system shall display an appropriate error message and prevent further actions if the user performs an invalid action.

Label: Section 5.3
Issue: Does not specify the expected behavior for different types of errors
Correction: The system shall categorize errors into critical and non-critical, displaying appropriate messages and taking necessary actions based on the error type.

Label: Section 6
Issue: Does not specify the version control strategy
Correction: The development team shall use Git for version control, following a branching strategy with feature branches, release branches, and a main branch.
